TGNMember.title: TGNMember
TGNMember.description: Represents a member of the Transcend Global Network.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TGN Member (matches Firebase Auth UID).

sectorPreferences.description: Array of sector names the member has preferences for (up to 3).

role.description: The member's role within the network (e.g., 'mentee', 'mentor_candidate', 'associate-mentor', 'collaborator', 'sponsor', 'country-manager', 'volunteer', 'media').

purpose.description: A description of the member's purpose for joining the network (a short bio).

identityProfile.description: A JSON string containing the member's self-identified goals and interests.

AffiliateReferral.title: AffiliateReferral
AffiliateReferral.description: Represents a referral in the affiliate income system.

referrerMemberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member who made the referral. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:N AffiliateReferral)

referredMemberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member who was referred. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:N AffiliateReferral)

commissionPercentage.description: The commission percentage for this referral (capped at 15%).

MentorCertification.title: MentorCertification
MentorCertification.description: Represents the certification status and details of a mentor.

id.description: Unique identifier for the mentor certification.

memberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member being certified as a mentor. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:1 MentorCertification)

programCompletion.description: Indicates if the mentor has completed the certification program.

platformActivityScore.description: Score based on the mentor's activity on the platform.

evaluationScore.description: Score based on evaluations received from mentees.

isVerified.description: Indicates if the mentor is a verified associate.

Wallet.title: Wallet
Wallet.description: Represents a member's digital wallet for multi-currency and USDT transactions.

memberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member who owns the wallet. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:1 Wallet)

currency.description: The main currency of the wallet (e.g., USD, EUR).

balance.description: The current balance in the wallet's currency.

usdtBalance.description: The current USDT balance in the wallet.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product sold on the e-commerce marketplace.

sellerMemberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member selling the product. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:N Product)

approvalStatus.description: Status of the product approval workflow.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents an event or congress organized within the TGN.

startDate.description: Start date and time of the event.

endDate.description: End date and time of the event.

MatchmakingRecommendation.title: MatchmakingRecommendation
MatchmakingRecommendation.description: Represents a matchmaking recommendation for a member.

memberId.description: Reference to the TGN Member receiving the recommendation. (Relationship: TGNMember 1:N MatchmakingRecommendation)

recommendedType.description: The type of item being recommended (Mentor, Program, Sector).

recommendedId.description: The ID of the recommended item (reference to Mentor, Program, or Sector).

explanation.description: Explanation for why this recommendation was made (generated by GenAI).

collections.description: Stores TGN Member profiles. Path-based ownership for private user data. Includes user's core information and role. The 'userId' param matches the Firebase Auth UID.
Stores information about mentorship sectors. Accessible to all members for reference.
Stores affiliate referral data. Security rules will control access based on referrer and referred member IDs.
Stores mentor certification data. Access controlled via security rules to allow updates by admins and the mentor themselves.
Stores wallet information for each member. Owned by member, with admin access for financial oversight. Denormalized 'memberId' field for authorization.
Stores product information for the e-commerce marketplace. Access controlled by sellerMemberId and admin roles. Includes 'sellerMemberId' for authorization independence.
Stores event information. Publicly accessible, but with admin controls for creation and modification.
Stores matchmaking recommendations for members. Accessible to the member to whom the recommendation is made, as indicated by 'memberId'.
Stores matchmaking recommendations for members. Nested under user to clearly show ownership and for easier access to recommendations specific to a user.
